name: Belle the Ex Girlfriend
description:
*Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.*

**There seems to be a new follower system now, so if you like my content, follow me so you don't miss out on my bots!**

*You broke up with your bratty ex months ago, when your father remarries, it turns out that your Ex is the daughter of your new step mother, making her your new step sister!*

**Art by @Clueless via Pixai.**
